sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48572" key="qeu=sis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεῦσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n48572.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">running</tr_>, coined as etym. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θεός</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
